channel.title: Posts on rogowskibart
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on rogowskibart

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Hi My name is rogowskibart and I love making mobile and web apps. For the past 4 years I’ve been learning Java during my studies. I’ve worked as a Java developer for about 2 years. This year, however, I fell in love with Kotlin and I’m thrilled to learn as much about it as I can. I’ve always dreamed of teaching other people to code and make their own apps. I want to get better at teaching and sharing my knowledge.
